description: Per-stage execution policies, token budgets, and runtime limits. Single source of truth — replaces hardcoded dicts in context_packs.py and writer.py.

global_characteristics: Normalize user input into canonical intake_manifest.json.
Validate required sections: proposal, toc_seed.
Do not infer missing fields — flag them for operator review.
local_characteristics: Intake scope is limited to the provided proposal and toc_seed only.
No model generation allowed — structural transformation only.

global_characteristics: Produce a stable BOOK_BLUEPRINT that downstream stages rely on.
Define word targets, anchor policy, and quality criteria explicitly.
Audience segmentation must be declared and not inferred later.
local_characteristics: Structure follows intake_manifest book intent.
Style guide tone profile is derived from proposal language.
Part/chapter hierarchy must be internally consistent.

global_characteristics: Produce WORK_ORDER and PIPELINE_STATUS from book_db state.
Prioritize unblocked chapters; flag gate_failed items for healing.
Parallelism rules: S4/S5/S7/S8 are chapter-independent.
local_characteristics: Work order reflects current pipeline state, not target state.
Pending items must be ordered by chapter sequence and dependency depth.

global_characteristics: Define source quality tiers and freshness windows explicitly.
Reserve appendix reference IDs before any chapter drafting begins.
Rights and provenance policy must be established here, not later.
local_characteristics: Research questions are scoped to the chapter's declared audience segment.
Image manifest soures are categorized: ext / usr / ai.

global_characteristics: Generate raw guide and anchor plan per chapter.
Anchor obligations must reference only IDs declared in ANCHOR_POLICY.
Do not write reader-facing prose — this is a plan, not a draft.
local_characteristics: Guide structure follows hook/context/insight/takeaway sections.
Evidence slots are chapter-local and appendix-aware.
Anchor budget per chapter is from WORD_TARGETS anchor_budget field.

global_characteristics: Preserve chapter structure and anchor obligations.
Prefer distilled policy context over raw master documents.
Use chapter-local research questions and source priorities.
local_characteristics: Audience tone follows book-local style guide.
Section target words follow chapter-local word targets.
Node context is limited to the active subsection plus continuity excerpts.

global_characteristics: Supplement S4 draft with verified references and citations.
Source trust filtering is mandatory — low-trust sources flagged only.
Anchor reference IDs must be reconciled with image_manifest.
local_characteristics: Scope limited to this chapter's declared research questions.
Freshness window follows chapter part policy from research_plan.json.

global_characteristics: Require attributable sources and trust filtering.
Keep publication-safe wording and fact caution.
Separate primary sources from supplemental low-trust signals.
local_characteristics: Freshness windows depend on chapter part and research policy.
Reference slots are chapter-local and appendix-aware.
Review focuses on the current chapter draft and current source queue only.

global_characteristics: Replace ANCHOR_SLOT tokens with rendered content only — no prose edits.
ANCHOR_START/END metadata must be preserved or commented out.
Non-anchor prose is read-only.
local_characteristics: Render type (table/mermaid/svg/image_ref) follows visual_plan.json.
Caption language is Korean-first per Reader Annotation Rule.

global_characteristics: Produce asset_collection_manifest with canonical filenames and paths.
appendix_ref ↔ image_manifest 1:1 reconciliation required.
Provenance source mode must be declared: ext / usr / ai.
local_characteristics: Cleared assets are staged to publication/assets/cleared/{chapter_id}/.
Offline binding status is tracked per anchor in the manifest.

global_characteristics: Validate ingested images against rights and provenance records.
AI-generated images require prompt and model recorded in sidecar.
Cleared assets must meet Google Books minimum resolution: 1600×2560px for cover.
local_characteristics: Per-anchor asset validation follows asset_collection_manifest.
Ingestion errors trigger ASHL healing pattern: ingestion_error_present.

global_characteristics: Merge cleared assets into draft3 per visual_plan.json.
Anchor block barrers must be preserved after asset injection.
META_START/META_END operational blocks are removed in this stage.
local_characteristics: appendix REFERENCE_INDEX.md is auto-generated from anchor references.
draft3 is the final pre-review manuscript — structural changes not allowed post-S7.

global_characteristics: Fix style violations against QUALITY_CRITERIA without altering meaning.
Korean orthography, foreign loanword notation, and heading rules enforced.
Anchor blocks are read-only.
local_characteristics: Style violation count is the primary gate check.
Copyedit scope is sentence/paragraph level — no structural rewrites.

global_characteristics: Preserve facts, names, chronology, and caveats.
Amplification must never mutate anchors or publication-safe blocks.
Grounded appendices and source lists are preserved, not rewritten.
local_characteristics: Rewrite only canonical chapter prose sections.
Reader payoff and scene cues depend on chapter part.
Amplification is measured against the source draft, not the whole book.

global_characteristics: Assemble all chapter draft3 files into publication/manuscript/.
Verify SQA gate pass for all chapters before proceeding.
META blocks must be fully removed; anchor blocks may remain as comments.
local_characteristics: Chapter order follows chapter_sequence from book_db.json.
REFERENCE_INDEX.md is finalized and cross-checked against all anchor refs.

global_characteristics: Apply selected style guide template to generate EPUB CSS.
Style guide selection is book-local — global defaults are overridable.
CUSTOM template requires explicit params_override in request.
local_characteristics: CSS output path: publication/epub/{book_id}/OEBPS/css/style.css.
Font embedding follows Google Books WOFF2 requirements.

global_characteristics: Produce EPUB 3.x compliant package with EPUB 2.0 NCX for compatibility.
OPF metadata must include Dublin Core + ISBN-13 or Google Books ID.
Cover image minimum: 1600×2560px, 300 DPI.
local_characteristics: EPUB file size per chapter: 50MB max.
TOC requires both NCX and nav.xhtml (navigation document).
